changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "A Familiar Face"

TextENGNew: ...Where did I lose the way?
I really did get myself lost in a completely unknown world.
Hinamizawa village. This place became an abandoned ruin after the gas disaster over 20 years ago.
After that, everyone was afraid of the mysterious incidents and rumors. Nobody ever goes anywhere near nowadays. It's a ghost town that they even took off the maps.
That's right... there's nobody here.
That should be, and yet...?
...Up ahead.
There was a person dressed in a mourning kimono, holding up an umbrella, dripping wet in the middle of the pouring rain.
She had a mysterious aura, somewhere between the living and the dead...
And I could see a long, slender, cloth-wrapped object bouncing around attached to her back.
...A pipe?
...A wooden sword?
Or maybe... an actual sword?
I swallowed my spit, and quickly started to lose my resolve.
Even from behind, I could tell she was suspicious... I felt the danger in the air.
``...Apparently ghosts appear here.``
As I remembered the words I said myself earlier, a chill ran through me and I began to tremble.
What should I do?
Even though it's abnormal for another person to be in a place like this...
What can I do?
Should I say something? Or...?
Just then,
The woman in the kimono started walking in the opposite direction of where I stood.
When I saw that, I started to panic and suddenly called out ``wait!``
She stopped as requested, but her back was still turned.
I could feel the sharp tension coming from behind her back... Bloodlust.
(Whatever, it's do or die...!)
Since escape was no longer possible, I decided to step forward and speak up.
``Uh, umm...@k@vS20/41/VTT_otobe3007. I came here to do some sightseeing,@k@vS20/41/VTT_otobe3008. but I got lost, and, umm...``
``I-if you don't mind... could you point me in the direction of the nearest town...?``
I could hear her exhale through her nose, like she was laughing at me. And then,

``You want to know where to find other people? It's in the direction I'm walking away from.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3051. Even someone unfamiliar with the area like yourself might be able to make it there by dawn.``
``Although, you might get lost in Yagouchi along the way.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3053. Hehehe!``
It wasn't much of an answer, but... for now it was a relief just to hear anything at all.
Thank goodness... Looks like she's a human, not a ghost.
``Uh, umm... if you don't mind, I'd appreciate it if you showed me the way.``
``Hah! Be serious.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3055. I have business to attend to.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3056. I'm not here to be your guide.``
``Personal business is one's own business.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3058. If you want to leave this village, you'll have to put forth the necessary effort.``
``In short, you'll have to give it everything you've got on your own if you wish to get out of here.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3060. Aahahhahhah!``
In other words, she wouldn't be able to do it.
So, am I going to be lost here all night...?
``W-where are you going?``
``......@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3062.I have something to take care of at the Furude Shrine up ahead, and...@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3063. huh...? Sa...?``
The next moment.
She casually turned around to face me eye to eye... and then her eyes suddenly opened wide.
And then she fixated on my face as she moved in for a closer look.
``...Satoshi?``
I didn't know how to respond to a name I didn't recognize.
When she said the name, Satoshi... was she talking about me?
``Satoshi? ...Is it you?``
``Huh? N-no...@k@vS20/41/VTT_otobe3019. Actually, my name is... Akira.``
``T-that's right... Akira Otobe....``
I thought it was a case of mistaken identity, so I panicked and said my name again.
After hearing that, she quietly gazed at my face for a while... and then she let out a lonely sounding laugh.

``Oh, my mistake.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3068. I must say though, I'm surprised... After all, you look just like an old friend of mine.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3069. I suppose it's what they call an accidental resemblance.``
``R-really...?``

``Ahahahah.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3071. Even though you're a different person, it's still a treat to see such a familiar face while coming to this village after such a long time!@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3072. I thought you might have been a ghost. I doubted my eyes... Hehehe!``
``R-right...``
``It's surprising enough to run into another person in this ghost town... but for it to be someone who looks just like Satoshi?@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3074. That's one hell of a coincidence...``
She smiled while carefully watching me with her arms crossed.
Though she was smiling, she stared straight at me with a sharp gaze in her eyes, and it made me flinch.
``That's fine, it must be fate.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3076. I'm sure you don't want to be out in the rain until morning, so would you care to come with me?``
``I-is that all right?``
``It doesn't matter. I asked if you'd like to come with me.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3078. Don't answer a question with a question.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3079. The rest depends on what you want, doesn't it?``
``Oh... D-definitely!@k@vS20/41/VTT_otobe3026. Please, let me come with you!``
I-I'm saved...!
I felt like I was about to burst into dance as I nodded to her over and over. After seeing that, the woman smiled and nodded, then started walking again.
``If it's like the old days, there should be some blankets in the assembly hall.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3081. Your jacket is dripping wet, so it would be best to dry off there.``
``...Of course, it's been over 20 years since then, so there's a chance the roof has collapsed and the tatami mats have gone rotten... Hehehe!``
``...U-umm.@k@vS20/41/VTT_otobe3028. Did you live in this village?``

``...Oh, that's right.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3084. I haven't introduced myself yet.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3085. My name is Mion... Mion Sonozaki.@k@vS20/43/VTT_mion3086. It's just as you suspect. I'm a resident of this village.``
